title: Principal Plant Manager at Indian Oil Corporation Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Indian Oil Corporation Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, Indian Oil Corporation Digital Technologies in Visakhapatnam is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Indian Oil Corporation Digital Technologies:
Indian Oil Corporation Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indian Oil Corporation Digital Technologies!
